query:
SELECT u.email, u.name, t.id as tenant_id, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deals WHERE tenant_id = t.id) as deal_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stakeholders WHERE tenant_id = t.id) as stakeholder_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetings WHERE tenant_id = t.id) as meeting_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM snapshots WHERE tenant_id = t.id) as snapshot_count
FROM users u
JOIN tenants t ON t.id = u.tenant_id
WHERE u.email = 'leo@meridianos.ai';
